title: coryphopteris fasciculata
intro: Coryphopteris fasciculata, also known as the Ceylon fern or Hair Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Coryphopteris fasciculata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Coryphopteris fasciculata may include teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
